To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a simple    
version control system that can handle basic operations such as initializing a  
repository, adding files, and committing changes. Below is the implementation of
minigit in JavaScript.                                                          

minigit.js                                                                      

                                                                                
#!/usr/bin/env node                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
const fs = require('fs');                                                       
                                                                                
const path = require('path');                                                   
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
const REPO_DIR = '.minigit';                                                    
                                                                                
const INDEX_FILE = 'index.json';                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
function init() {                                                               
                                                                                
    if (fs.existsSync(REPO_DIR)) {                                              
                                                                                
        console.error('Repository already initialized.');                       
                                                                                
        process.exit(1);                                                        
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    fs.mkdirSync(REPO_DIR);                                                     
                                                                                
    fs.writeFileSync(path.join(REPO_DIR, INDEX_FILE), JSON.stringify({}, null,  
2));                                                                            
                                                                                
    console.log('Initialized empty repository.');                               
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
function add(file) {                                                            
                                                                                
    if (!fs.existsSync(file)) {                                                 
                                                                                
        console.error(`File ${file} does not exist.`);                          
                                                                                
        process.exit(1);                                                        
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    const repoPath = path.resolve(REPO_DIR, file);                              
                                                                                
    const indexFilePath = path.join(REPO_DIR, INDEX_FILE);                      
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    let index;                                                                  
                                                                                
    try {                                                                       
                                                                                
        index = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(indexFilePath));                     
                                                                                
    } catch (e) {                                                               
                                                                                
        console.error('Failed to read index file.');                            
                                                                                
        process.exit(1);                                                        
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    if (!index[file]) {                                                         
                                                                                
        fs.copyFileSync(file, repoPath);                                        
                                                                                
        index[file] = { path: repoPath };                                       
                                                                                
    } else {                                                                    
                                                                                
        const currentHash = fs.readFileSync(repoPath).toString('hex');          
                                                                                
        const newHash = fs.readFileSync(file).toString('hex');                  
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
        if (currentHash !== newHash) {                                          
                                                                                
            fs.copyFileSync(file, repoPath);                                    
                                                                                
            index[file].hash = newHash;                                         
                                                                                
        }                                                                       
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    fs.writeFileSync(indexFilePath, JSON.stringify(index, null, 2));            
                                                                                
    console.log(`Added file ${file}.`);                                         
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
function commit(message) {                                                      
                                                                                
    const indexFilePath = path.join(REPO_DIR, INDEX_FILE);                      
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    let index;                                                                  
                                                                                
    try {                                                                       
                                                                                
        index = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(indexFilePath));                     
                                                                                
    } catch (e) {                                                               
                                                                                
        console.error('Failed to read index file.');                            
                                                                                
        process.exit(1);                                                        
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    if (Object.keys(index).length === 0) {                                      
                                                                                
        console.error('No changes to commit.');                                 
                                                                                
        process.exit(1);                                                        
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    const commitHash = Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);                 
                                                                                
    const commitPath = path.join(REPO_DIR, `commit-${commitHash}`);             
                                                                                
    fs.mkdirSync(commitPath);                                                   
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    for (const file in index) {                                                 
                                                                                
        const filePath = index[file].path;                                      
                                                                                
        const destPath = path.join(commitPath, file);                           
                                                                                
        fs.copyFileSync(filePath, destPath);                                    
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    const commitData = { message, files: Object.keys(index), hash: commitHash };
                                                                                
    fs.writeFileSync(path.join(REPO_DIR, `commit-${commitHash}.json`),          
JSON.stringify(commitData, null, 2));                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    console.log(`Committed ${Object.keys(index).length} file(s) with message    
"${message}".`);                                                                
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
function log() {                                                                
                                                                                
    const commits = [];                                                         
                                                                                
    for (const file of fs.readdirSync(REPO_DIR)) {                              
                                                                                
        if (file.startsWith('commit-')) {                                       
                                                                                
            const commitPath = path.join(REPO_DIR, file);                       
                                                                                
            const commitData = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(commitPath +          
'.json'));                                                                      
                                                                                
            commits.push(commitData);                                           
                                                                                
        }                                                                       
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    commits.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.hash).getTime() - new                     
Date(a.hash).getTime());                                                        
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    for (const commit of commits) {                                             
                                                                                
        console.log(`commit ${commit.hash}`);                                   
                                                                                
        console.log(`Author: <unknown>`);                                       
                                                                                
        console.log(`Date:   ${new Date(commit.hash).toISOString()}`);          
                                                                                
        console.log();                                                          
                                                                                
        console.log(`    ${commit.message}`);                                   
                                                                                
        console.log();                                                          
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
function main() {                                                               
                                                                                
    const args = process.argv.slice(2);                                         
                                                                                
    if (args.length === 0) {                                                    
                                                                                
        console.error('Usage: minigit <command> [options]');                    
                                                                                
        process.exit(1);                                                        
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    switch (args[0]) {                                                          
                                                                                
        case 'init':                                                            
                                                                                
            init();                                                             
                                                                                
            break;                                                              
                                                                                
        case 'add':                                                             
                                                                                
            add(args[1]);                                                       
                                                                                
            break;                                                              
                                                                                
        case 'commit':                                                          
                                                                                
            commit(args.slice(2).join(' '));                                    
                                                                                
            break;                                                              
                                                                                
        case 'log':                                                             
                                                                                
            log();                                                              
                                                                                
            break;                                                              
                                                                                
        default:                                                                
                                                                                
            console.error(`Unknown command: ${args[0]}`);                       
                                                                                
            process.exit(1);                                                    
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                
}                                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
main();                                                                         
                                                                                

Makefile                                                                        

                                                                                
minigit: minigit.js                                                             
                                                                                
    node minigit.js                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
.PHONY: clean                                                                   
                                                                                
clean:                                                                          
                                                                                
    rm -rf .minigit
